mechanics.excerpt: system IS being shut down; hacking character can make one Computer Check per round in a attempt to extract data; these attempts suffer pressure modifier of +1 in addition to all other applicable modifiers_ Gamemasters should note that only the most sensitive data is continually monitored by live sysops_ CLIMBING The Climbing Skill enables characters to scale natural and manmade obstacles Various conditions affect the difficulty of climb Simulate these variables by applying TN modifiers Climbing Action Checks based on the guidelines found on the Target Number Modifiers Table (p 17); abundant handholds might offer Modifier; while slippery rocks r high winds would inflict +1 +3 Modifiers worse depending the severity Of the weather; failed Climbing Check results in fall: See the Falling sec tion in Combat; 120 , for rules on damage caused by falling CRYPTOGRAPHY Characters use the Cryptography Skill encode and decode messages.
